results.title: SIT summons Sampla, two retired IAS officers in 2015 Faridkot cases

results.title: JUST IN: APC Suffers Defeat as INEC Declares Winner of Rivers South-East By-Election
results.description: The Independent National Electoral Commission has declared Olaka Nwogu of the Peoples Democratic Party as the winner of the Rivers South-East senatorial by-election, with the ruling All Progressives Congress losing out.Nwogu secured a landslide victory after polling a total of 47,961 votes while the candidate of the APC gathered only 1,647 votes. The Action Alliance ... The post JUST IN: APC Suffers Defeat as INEC Declares Winner of Rivers South-East By-Election appeared first on Politics Nigeria .

results.title: Musić za Pobjedu: Mandić bez DNP-a nema polugu nad PES-om, a glavna tema je hoće li u junu 2027. tražiti više za sebe
results.description: Lideri ZBCG imaju SPC kao vezivno tkivo i matematika je jasna – obojica će se naći za stolom sa PES-om, Demokratama, SNP-om, BS-om i možda „namirenim Abazovićem“, smatra Aleksandar Musić

results.title: 17 statues around Boston that got the Scottish traffic cone treatment this summer
results.description: Massachusetts’ “Bewitched” and Duckling statues, all wearing traffic cones in the fashion of Glasgow, Scotland, and the country’s Tartan Army soccer fans.

results.title: US VP Vance lands in Switzerland for technical talks with Iran
results.description: Zurich: US Vice President JD Vance landed in Switzerland on Sunday (local time) for US-Iran talks, as reported by CNN, citing the update by his office. US Vice President JD Vance and Second Lady Usha Vance departed for Switzerland on Saturday (local time) for technical-level talks with Iran, following the signing of the 14-point memorandum [...] The post US VP Vance lands in Switzerland for technical talks with Iran appeared first on KalingaTV .

results.title: CJP protest in Delhi: Dipke, supporters continue sit-in overnight at Jantar Mantar; urge people to join protest
results.description: CJP protest at Jantar Mantar continues, urging public support for accountability in NEET paper leak controversy and Education Minister's resignation.
